title: selaginella densa var. scopulorum
intro: Selaginella densa var. scopulorum, also known as Rosy Maidenhair Fern or Rock Maidenhair, is a species of evergreen fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Selaginella densa var. scopulorum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
